patterns_discovered.structured_testing: Consistent pattern of comprehensive test documentation with clear priority levels (P0/P1/P2), preconditions, detailed steps, expected results, and actual result sections
patterns_discovered.progress_tracking: Systematic progress tracking across multiple files (build-progress.txt, implementation_plan.json) with consistent timestamp updates and status markers
patterns_discovered.offline_first_methodology: Test plan follows offline-first best practices with categorized testing scenarios covering flight mode, connectivity issues, concurrent editing, and edge cases
patterns_discovered.comprehensive_coverage: Pattern of thorough test coverage across 10 major categories: flight mode, poor connectivity, app interruptions, concurrent device editing, server errors, large data scenarios, UI/UX, edge cases, performance testing, and security

gotchas_discovered.large_test_document: The manual test plan is very large (1,225 lines), which could make it challenging to maintain and update
gotchas_discovered.multi_device_testing: Concurrent device testing requires physical hardware setup (multiple devices) which adds complexity to test execution
gotchas_discovered.network_simulation: Test scenarios depend on network simulation tools (Charles Proxy, Chrome DevTools) which may not be readily available
gotchas_discovered.performance_thresholds: Testing includes performance benchmarks that need careful calibration and may be environment-dependent

approach_outcome.methodical_approach: Successfully created comprehensive manual test plan using structured approach with clear categories, priorities, and detailed test scenarios
approach_outcome.comprehensive_coverage: Achieved complete coverage of all acceptance criteria with 39 detailed test scenarios across 10 testing categories
approach_outcome.practical_execution: Test plan includes practical setup instructions, prerequisites, and realistic test scenarios for offline-first functionality
approach_outcome.quality_assurance: Created thorough QA framework that covers critical user journeys, edge cases, and potential failure modes

recommendations: Consider modularizing the large test plan into separate files for different test categories to improve maintainability
Create automated test scripts to supplement manual testing where possible, especially for repetitive scenarios
Develop clear documentation for setting up network simulation tools and test environments
